description: Deterministic system-map seeds. The generator turns these into regions, chunks, and cells from the live repo, like a Minecraft world map for file management.

regions.label: Core Entry Package Mesa
regions.purpose: Top-level package and public entry surfaces that define what SCBE exports first.

regions.label: Harmonic Crypto Governance Range
regions.purpose: The 14-layer governance, harmonic, crypto, and exported policy logic.

regions.label: Tokenizer Python Substrate Caverns
regions.purpose: Tokenizer, Sacred Tongue, chemistry, bit spine, and Python substrate surfaces.

regions.label: Compiler And Polyglot Brick Ridge
regions.purpose: CA opcode compiler, polyglot emitters, conformance checks, and mixed-expression staging lanes for multi-language code bricks.

regions.label: AetherDesk Portable PC Basin
regions.purpose: Local web desktop, bounded shell profiles, touch/voice/text control surfaces, receipts, and remote-device bridge work.

regions.label: Local Agent Bus Forest
regions.purpose: Local agent implementations, Node/Python agent-bus packages, receipts, and operator-facing work routing.

regions.label: System Ops Control Plateau
regions.purpose: Operational scripts, MCP/terminal control, safe shell lanes, and system configuration surfaces.

regions.label: API Control Plane Delta
regions.purpose: Older governance API plus newer Python MVP/control-plane service lane.

regions.label: Training Builder Farm
regions.purpose: Dataset builders, model manifests, coding-system corpus tools, and local training launchers.

regions.label: Eval Benchmark Farm
regions.purpose: Benchmarks, eval drivers, public-style adapters, gates, and comparison reports.

regions.label: Docs Ops Specs Map Room
regions.purpose: Specs, ops notes, release maps, backlog notes, and decision records that guide current work.

regions.label: Docs Research Notes Map Room
regions.purpose: Research writeups, theory notes, source manifests, and open-question ledgers.

regions.label: Artifacts Generated Quarantine
regions.purpose: Generated evidence and receipts that should stay visible but not define the primary runtime story.

regions.label: Dist Build Output Quarantine
regions.purpose: Build output that should be release-checked but not treated as source terrain.

regions.label: Training Data Quarantine
regions.purpose: Accumulated corpora and generated training rows; useful evidence but noisy for runtime orientation.

systems.name: Fibonacci Trust Ladder + Turing Self-Tune Loop
